zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多延续
zh.content:
当前/USD维持在6.74附近高位整理，价格结构保持小级别上升趋势，短线回调有限并持续依托均线系统运行，多头仍占主导但动能有所放缓。

技术指标方面，MACD维持正值并位于零轴上方，说明多头动能仍在延续，但RSI未给出限制了超买强度判断。价格稳站SMA20上方，趋势结构仍保持偏多状态。

支撑位关注6.70与6.60区域，一旦跌破可能回测中期均线支撑。阻力集中在6.75至6.80区间，若有效突破将打开进一步上行空间。

整体来看当前波动率逐步收敛，更适合区间震荡交易策略。若放量突破6.80则趋势延续，否则仍以高位震荡结构对待并控制追涨风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading at 6.7401, holding slightly above its 20-period simple moving average at 6.6067. This positioning suggests that short-term momentum remains constructive despite the relatively modest 24-hour gain of 0.21%. Price action has stayed near the upper end of the daily range between 6.7091 and 6.7432, indicating that buyers continue to defend recent advances and maintain control of the near-term trend.

The moving average structure favors a mildly bullish outlook as long as price remains above 6.61. MACD stands at 0.0736, which is positive and typically reflects upward momentum in the prevailing trend. While the signal line and RSI readings are unavailable, the positive MACD value suggests that buying pressure has not yet faded significantly. However, the lack of stronger price expansion indicates that momentum is present but not accelerating aggressively.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 6.71, corresponding to the session low area, followed by stronger support around the 20-period SMA near 6.61. A break below these levels could expose a deeper pullback toward the 6.50 region. On the upside, resistance is forming around 6.74, the recent high. A sustained breakout above this zone would strengthen bullish sentiment and could open the door to a move toward the 6.85–7.00 area.

For trading purposes, momentum-oriented participants may consider long positions on a confirmed breakout above 6.74 with increasing volume, targeting higher resistance levels while managing risk below nearby support. More conservative traders may prefer waiting for a pullback toward the 6.61–6.70 support zone before considering entries. If price closes decisively below the moving average, the bullish bias would weaken, favoring a defensive stance until clearer trend confirmation emerges.
